overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired character walking through a moonlit garden path lined with red roses, transitioning to an ornate waterfront terrace with classical columns, and finally onto a wooden dock extending over a dark lake. The scene features atmospheric torch lighting against a teal night sky with distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path through the rose garden, passing an NPC with a torch

notable_agents.action: standing by the path holding a lit torch

entered.detail: worn cobblestone pathway winding through the garden
dense bushes with vibrant red roses lining the path
low stone wall with decorative pillars
silhouetted spires against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by dense red rose bushes and stone walls. An NPC holding a torch stands near the path as the character passes by. The sky is partially visible through the trees, with distant spires silhouetted against the teal night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside cobblestone path with mountain views

events.description: path opens up to reveal the lake and mountain range

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens to the waterfront

entered.detail: calm dark water reflecting the teal night sky
silhouetted mountains against the cloudy sky
tall stone pillar with burning torch

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up from the enclosed garden to a wider lakeside path. The cobblestone continues along the water's edge with wooden railings on the left and the lake visible on the right. Mountains rise in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate waterfront terrace with classical columns

events.description: enters the columned terrace area with ornate architecture

agents.ego_description: walking along the grand terrace past tall stone columns and torch braziers

entered.detail: smooth cut stone tiles replacing the cobblestones
tall classical stone pillars with ornate capitals lining the terrace
standing metal braziers with bright flames

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an ornate waterfront terrace featuring tall stone columns and burning torch braziers. The paved stone surface replaces the cobblestones as the path curves along the water's edge. The architecture features classical arches and decorative stonework.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over the lake

events.description: steps from stone terrace onto wooden dock

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock extending over the dark water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks extending over the lake water

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the stone terrace onto a narrow wooden dock that extends over the dark lake water. The surrounding forest and mountains are visible across the water as the character reaches the end of the dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed, floral garden path toward an open waterfront terrace and a secluded wooden dock. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by dense red rose bushes and stone walls, passing a torch-bearing NPC under a teal night sky. As the garden opens up, the path expands into a lakeside walkway with wooden railings and a view of distant mountains across the water. The scene then shifts to an ornate terrace where paved stone replaces the cobblestones, curving past classical columns and burning torch braziers. Finally, the character transitions from the stone architecture onto a narrow wooden dock that extends over the dark lake toward the surrounding forest and mountains.
